title: Medicinal and Aromatic Plants Program Educational Objectives
content:
Medicinal and Aromatic Plants Program Educational Objectives

1.

To educate qualified technicians equipped with fundamental knowledge, skills, and competencies required by the profession in the field of medicinal and aromatic plants.

2.

To train individuals who act in accordance with professional ethical principles and take an active role in the production, processing, and utilization of medicinal and aromatic plants while developing solution-oriented approaches.

3.

To cultivate professionals capable of following technical and professional developments and participating in research and development (R&D) activities in the field.

4.

To provide a theoretical and practical educational infrastructure that enables graduates to pursue careers in both public and private sector organizations.

5.

To support the development of entrepreneurial skills, enabling students to establish their own agricultural enterprises in the field of medicinal and aromatic plants.

6. To foster individuals who embrace lifelong learning, are open to continuous self-improvement, and are sensitive to environmental and societal needs.
